name: Angel of Zera
name_jp: ゼラの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Gains 100 ATK for each of your opponent's banished cards. During the Standby Phase of the next turn after this card was banished: Special Summon this banished card. You can only use this effect of "Angel of Zera" once per turn.
